name: @etauker/home-automation
description: Central hub for IoT and home automation.

scripts.push: npm install && npm run lint && cross-env MODE=production npm run build && npm run test && git push --follow-tags
scripts.start-automation: cd automation && docker compose --profile production up --detach
scripts.stop-automation: cd automation && docker compose --profile production down
scripts.start-entertainment: cd entertainment && docker compose --profile production up --detach
scripts.stop-entertainment: cd entertainment && docker compose --profile production down
scripts.start-hobbies: cd hobbies && docker compose --profile production up --detach
scripts.stop-hobbies: cd hobbies && docker compose --profile production down
scripts.start-office: cd office && docker compose --profile production up --detach
scripts.stop-office: cd office && docker compose --profile production down
scripts.start-security: cd security && docker compose --profile production up --detach
scripts.stop-security: cd security && docker compose --profile production down
scripts.start-all: npm run start automation && npm run start-entertainment && npm run start-hobbies && npm run start-office && npm run start-security
scripts.stop-all: npm run stop automation && npm run stop-entertainment && npm run stop-hobbies && npm run stop-office && npm run stop-security
scripts.update-hass: cd automation && docker compose pull home-assistant && docker compose up home-assistant --remove-orphans -d && docker image prune
